zh.Baddesley Clinton, Warwickshire, England: 英國瓦維其可爾巴德斯利 克林頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Ferrers於1479年出生在英國米德萊可倫敦時，她的父親Henry de Ferrers IV37歲，母親Margaret Hexstall37歲。她和James Gamond至少有1個女兒。她去世於1527年在她的家鄉享年48歲。

zh-hans.Baddesley Clinton, Warwickshire, England: 英国瓦維其可爾巴德斯利 克林頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Ferrers于1479年出生在英国米德萊可倫敦时，她的父亲Henry de Ferrers IV37岁，母亲Margaret Hexstall37岁。她和James Gamond至少有1个女儿。她去世于1527年在她的家乡享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Ferrers was born in 1479, in London, Middlesex, England, her father, Henry de Ferrers IV, was 37 and her mother, Margaret Hexstall, was 37. She had at least 1 daughter with James Gamond. She died in 1527, in her hometown, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Ferrers est née en 1479, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Henry de Ferrers IV, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Margaret Hexstall, avait 37 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec James Gamond. Elle est décédée en 1527, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Ferrers 1479 in London, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry de Ferrers IV 37 und ihre Mutter Margaret Hexstall 37. Sie hatte mit James Gamond mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1527 im Alter von 48 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Ferrers è nata il nel 1479 nel London, Middlesex, England, sua padre, Henry de Ferrers IV, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Margaret Hexstall, aveva 37 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con James Gamond. Morì nel 1527, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Ferrersが1479年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで生まれた時，父Henry de Ferrers IVは37歳，母Margaret Hexstallは37歳であった。彼女はJames Gamondとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1527年に故郷で48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Ferrers(이)가 1479년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry de Ferrers IV(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Hexstall(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 James Gamond(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1527년 그녀의 고향에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Ferrers nasceu em 1479, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry de Ferrers IV, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Hexstall, tinha 37 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com James Gamond. Ela faleceu em 1527, em sua cidade natal, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Ferrers родилась в 1479 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry de Ferrers IV было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Hexstall, 37. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от James Gamond. Она умерла в 1527 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Ferrers nació en 1479, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry de Ferrers IV, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Margaret Hexstall, tenía 37 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con James Gamond. Murió en 1527, en su pueblo, a la edad de 48 años.
